info.name: ECommerce-Project API
info.description: End-to-end test suite for the ECommerce-Project API. Requires a {{baseUrl}} environment variable (e.g. http://localhost:3000). Run folders top-to-bottom (or the whole collection via Collection Runner) - later requests depend on IDs saved by earlier ones. Re-running the whole collection from the top works too, since category/product names are timestamped and won't collide on the unique-name index.
